title: Most slow queries are a missing composite index, not a slow database.
quote: Read the EXPLAIN before you blame the engine.

title: MySQL's null-safe equality (<=>) quietly saves you from NULL-comparison bugs.
quote: = lies about NULL; <=> tells the truth.

title: Durable workflows turn 'retry logic' from app code into a platform guarantee.
quote: Let the workflow engine remember, so your services don't have to.
